text:
If you are looking to change the look of your WhatsApp messages, Red WhatsApp is a great way to achieve this. Unlike the old, white version, you can customize the font, size, and color of your messages. The download should take less than five minutes. You can choose from solid colors and images to create a unique look. Once you've downloaded the app : https://modpree.com/whatsapp-plus-rojo/ , you'll need to copy the images from your computer and paste them into your new profile.

You can use the Rojo WhatsApp app on Windows, phones and tablets. It contains many useful features such as DND mode which allows you to chat without anyone knowing you are using it. It also has features to report spammers and protect your conversations. It also has a settings menu, which you can use to learn more about the different tools it has to offer. You can explore each tool in more detail through the Settings menu.

The WhatsApp red tick message that has been doing the rounds on the social network is completely bogus. Despite the false message, the underlying message claims that the government has started legal proceedings against him. It also claims that your device is being monitored, which is not the case. Also, the Three Red Ticks feature does not exist, which is another false claim. In fact, it was the same fake message that made the rounds last year.
